{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Song of Nakothi
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The song of [[Nakothi]] is described as running through [[Shera]]'s head like a toxic river.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
